name: Goblin
traits: Nimble Escape lets the goblin Disengage or Hide as a bonus action.
actions: Scimitar: +4 to hit, 1d6 + 2 slashing damage.
Shortbow: +4 to hit, range 80/320 ft, 1d6 + 2 piercing damage.

name: Orc
traits: Aggressive lets the orc move up to its speed toward an enemy as a bonus action.
actions: Greataxe: +5 to hit, 1d12 + 3 slashing damage.
Javelin: +5 to hit, range 30/120 ft, 1d6 + 3 piercing damage.

name: Skeleton
actions: Shortsword: +4 to hit, 1d6 + 2 piercing damage.
Shortbow: +4 to hit, range 80/320 ft, 1d6 + 2 piercing damage.

name: Zombie
traits: Undead Fortitude can keep the zombie standing after being reduced to 0 hit points.
actions: Slam: +3 to hit, 1d6 + 1 bludgeoning damage.

name: Owlbear
traits: Keen Sight and Smell gives advantage on Perception checks that rely on sight or smell.
actions: Multiattack: one beak attack and one claws attack.
Beak: +7 to hit, 1d10 + 5 piercing damage.
Claws: +7 to hit, 2d8 + 5 slashing damage.

name: Gelatinous Cube
traits: Transparent makes the cube hard to spot.
Ooze Cube lets it move through spaces while engulfing creatures.
actions: Pseudopod: +3 to hit, 3d6 acid damage.
Engulf: can move into creatures' spaces and restrain targets inside the cube.

name: Mimic
traits: Shapechanger lets the mimic alter its form.
Adhesive causes creatures and objects touching it to stick.
actions: Pseudopod: +5 to hit, 1d8 + 3 bludgeoning damage plus grapple via Adhesive.
Bite: +5 to hit, 1d8 + 3 piercing damage.

name: Basilisk
traits: Petrifying Gaze can restrain creatures and eventually turn them to stone.
actions: Bite: +5 to hit, 2d6 + 3 piercing damage plus 2d6 poison damage.

name: Troll
traits: Regeneration restores hit points unless the troll took acid or fire damage since its last turn.
actions: Multiattack: one bite attack and two claws attacks.
Bite: +7 to hit, 1d6 + 4 piercing damage.
Claw: +7 to hit, 2d6 + 4 slashing damage.

name: Young Red Dragon
traits: Fire Breath recharges on a 5-6 and deals 16d6 fire damage in a 30-foot cone.
actions: Multiattack: one bite attack and two claw attacks.
Bite: +10 to hit, 2d10 + 6 piercing damage plus 1d6 fire damage.
Claw: +10 to hit, 2d6 + 6 slashing damage.

name: Beholder
traits: Antimagic Cone suppresses magic in a 150-foot cone from its central eye.
actions: Bite: +5 to hit, 4d6 piercing damage.
Eye Rays: fires three magical rays each turn from a rotating list of effects.

name: Lich
traits: Legendary Resistance helps the lich shrug off failed saves.
Rejuvenation allows the lich to return if its phylactery remains intact.
actions: Paralyzing Touch: +12 to hit, 3d6 cold damage and can paralyze the target.
Spellcasting: the lich is a 9th-level spellcaster with a full suite of high-level magic.
